confidence_rationale: Clear video showing complete task execution with all 6 objects successfully transferred in both directions. No penalties observed. Timing well-documented through frame sequence.
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with exceptional efficiency. All 6 objects transferred correctly in both directions within 18 seconds, demonstrating excellent bimanual coordination and minimal wasted motion.
strengths: Extremely fast completion time (18s vs 40-60s expert benchmark)
Smooth midair transfers with no drops
Efficient instrument movements with minimal repositioning
Perfect adherence to required transfer sequence
improvement_suggestions: Performance already at exceptional expert level with no areas requiring improvement
